output: Completed T8. task_updates.executor_notes: Removed `@xzdarcy/react-timeline-editor` from `package.json` and `package-lock.json` via `npm uninstall`. Verification: `grep -R "xzdarcy" src/` returns no matches, `rg -n "xzdarcy|react-virtualized" package.json package-lock.json` returns no matches, `npm ls @xzdarcy/react-timeline-editor react-virtualized` reports an empty tree, and `test -d node_modules/react-virtualized && echo present || echo missing` reports `missing`. The lockfile diff shows the xzdarcy subtree and transitive `interactjs`/`react-virtualized` entries were removed. Build gates passed with `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false` and `npm run build`; the production build emitted final asset sizes including `dist/assets/index-CHiZ4DHk.js` at `3513.08 kB` minified / `960.12 kB` gzip. Best-effort bundle-size conclusion: the removed dependency subtree strongly indicates the expected reduction, but a direct >=200 kB minified delta was not measured because no local visualizer or pre-removal baseline was available.
commands_run: test -d node_modules/react-virtualized && echo present || echo missing

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: `@xzdarcy/react-timeline-editor` is gone from `package.json`, `package-lock.json`, and `node_modules`, and `react-virtualized` is also no longer installed. `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false` and `npm run build` both succeed. Direct confirmation of a >=200 kB minified bundle reduction was not possible in this environment because `vite-bundle-visualizer` is not installed and there is no recorded pre-removal build baseline; best-effort evidence is the lockfile removal of the xzdarcy/interactjs/react-virtualized subtree plus the absence of `@xzdarcy/react-timeline-editor`, `react-virtualized`, and `interactjs` strings in `dist/assets`.
